tasks.instruction:
Apply the smallest station patch: signal-amber has the wrong color, train-door slid right, and overhead-wire has the wrong curve. Fix only those ids.

Patch:
- overhead-wire.d: "M8 24 C42 16 74 16 108 24 S176 32 212 24" -> "M8 18 C42 10 74 10 108 18 S176 26 212 18"
- train-door.x: 139 -> 128
- signal-amber.fill: "#000000" -> "#f59e0b"

Repair the disturbed scenic SVG: misty mountain sunrise.

Patch:
- remove sv_021-extra-survey-marker
- download-sv_021-circle-002.fill: "#ef4444" -> "#fff8e6"
- download-sv_021-circle-001.cx: 1125.0 -> 1090
- download-sv_021-path-001.opacity: 0.25 -> 0.55

Apply the smallest harbor patch: buoy-green-stripe was repainted, mast is too thick, and rope-coil has the wrong path. Fix only those three defects.

Patch:
- rope-coil.d: "M48 82 C54 70 74 72 76 86 C78 100 52 100 48 90 C44 78 58 76 66 88" -> "M48 82 C58 72 70 74 70 84 C70 94 54 96 50 88 C46 80 60 78 62 86"
- mast.stroke-width: 6 -> 3
- buoy-green-stripe.fill: "#ef4444" -> "#22c55e"

Repair the disturbed scenic SVG: bioluminescent deep sea.

Patch:
- remove sv_022-extra-survey-marker
- download-sv_022-path-002.stroke: "#f97316" -> "#ffd6f2"
- download-sv_022-circle-001.cx: 243.0 -> 200
- download-sv_022-path-001.stroke-width: 8.0 -> 3
- download-sv_022-polygon-002.opacity: 0.32 -> 0.7

Repair the station locally: clock-hour is missing, clock-minute was duplicated, poster-blue shifted right, and platform-crack has the wrong path. Change only those parts.

Patch:
- platform-crack.d: "M18 112 C32 116 42 103 56 112 S82 114 96 108" -> "M18 108 C32 104 42 111 56 108 S82 106 96 110"
- poster-blue.x: 185 -> 178
- remove clock-minute-dup
- add clock-hour: <line id="clock-hour" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1.5" x1="196" y1="31" x2="196" y2="23" />

Repair the disturbed scenic SVG: rainy cyberpunk alley.

Patch:
- remove sv_023-extra-survey-marker
- download-sv_023-rect-015.fill: "#f59e0b" -> "#46e0ff"

- download-sv_023-rect-035.stroke-width: 12.0 -> 6

Repair the campsite locally: tent-flap moved, star-2 is missing, flame-front has the wrong color, and smoke-curl has the wrong path. Fix only those ids.

Patch:
- smoke-curl.d: "M168 80 C182 72 150 66 172 58 C184 50 154 46 170 38" -> "M168 80 C154 72 178 64 164 56 C154 50 174 46 166 38"
- flame-front.fill: "#f97316" -> "#fde047"
- add star-2: <circle id="star-2" fill="#fde68a" cx="72" cy="16" r="1.8" />
- tent-flap.points: [[73,101],[87,71],[101,101]] -> [[82,96],[96,66],[110,96]]

Repair the market locally: remove the stray price sticker, restore pear-2's color, and restore bike-handlebar's curve. Preserve all stalls, fruit crates, shopper, and wheels.

Patch:
- bike-handlebar.d: "M122 96 C134 82 142 94 138 104" -> "M122 96 C130 88 136 92 136 98"
- pear-2.fill: "#dc2626" -> "#a3e635"
- remove stray-price-sticker

Repair the harbor locally: remove extra-orange-buoy, flip sail-main back, and move cabin-window back into the cabin. Leave the lighthouse and real buoys untouched.

Patch:
- cabin-window.x: 106 -> 114
- cabin-window.y: 70 -> 67
- sail-main.points: [[144.66666666666669,30],[116.66666666666669,76],[144.66666666666669,76]] -> [[126,30],[154,76],[126,76]]
